When it comes to table tennis at the Paris Olympics, China will once again be the nation to beat.They have won 32 of the 37 gold medals on offer since the sport made its Olympic debut in 1998.

The legendary Ma Long will be looking for a sixth Olympic gold medal. Although he missed out on a spot on China芒聙聶s singles team, he was picked for the team event.

Steve Dainton is the head of the International Table Tennis Federation. He told CGTN芒聙聶s Dan Williams that if Long achieves that sixth gold, it would cement his place as the greatest player of all time.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.
